text.title: Figma AI Ecosystem Map Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for figma-ai-ecosystem.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the report cover all first-party surfaces + plugin overlap + risk per AI policy?

conclusion.verdict: REWRITE — re-pull Figma changelog and re-enumerate
FLAG — block adoption pending compliance review
PUBLISH — record + schedule next month's refresh
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
